name: Blueberry Soda Cracker Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
2. Add the sugar and crushed soda crackers to the same bowl, stirring until well mixed.
3. Stir in the melted butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Spread half of the crumb mixture into a lightly greased 9-inch pie plate.
5. Arrange the blueberry pie filling over the crumb layer, mashing berries with the lemon juice to release juices.
6. Top with the remaining crumb mixture.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and set.
8. Cool on a rack before serving.
9. Serve with lightly sweetened vanilla-flavored whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
